hero.body: Need controller consultation for a specific production line, custom manufacturing, bulk pricing, or urgent technical support — the QS team responds within 4 business hours and is on-site within 24 hours nationwide.

instructions.checklistTitle: Including the following will help us advise you faster
checklist: The machine type you use / want to build (milling, turning, bending, gluing…)
Number of axes to control and open-loop / closed-loop requirements
Travel dimensions and the precision you need
Expected order quantity and required delivery time
Any controller you've used before (if any)

items.name: QS Technology — Ho Chi Minh City

faq.heading: Before you call, you might already have the answer

items.q: Does QS provide on-site support outside HCMC?
items.a: Yes. The QS technical team is on-site within 24 hours across all 35 provinces. Service fees follow a public price list and are free for customers within the warranty period.

items.q: What is the standard delivery time?
items.a: In-stock items (F54, F86, Astro 6AH) ship in 3–5 business days. Custom orders (custom config, OEM) ship in 4–6 weeks from order confirmation.

items.q: Do you offer custom controller development?
items.a: Yes. QS's Custom Engineering service designs the PCB, writes the firmware, and delivers turnkey within 8 weeks. Minimum 50 units per OEM order.

items.q: What about warranty and replacement parts?
items.a: A 24-month hardware warranty and free firmware support for the product's lifetime. Replacement parts are guaranteed available for at least 8 years after discontinuation.
